title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Intel India Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Intel India Digital Technologies:
Intel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India Digital Technologies!
jsonLd.skills: Docker, Node.js, JavaScript, TensorFlow, SQL, Machine Learning, TypeScript, AWS
